aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Prosperity Heating & Cooling due to insufficient structured data and lack of authority signals. Their current content is not optimized for AI queries, making them less competitive in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to define the business clearly for AI models.
Create and embed an FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries and improve AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and significantly limiting local search presence.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not set up or claimed.
Lack of GBP photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Expand NAP citations to additional local and industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for instructional content
Lack of review or testimonial schema

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of schema markup prevents AI from understanding and recommending their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Indianapolis' and 'best central heating and air units'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide structured data for AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and customer testimonials to establish expertise and trust.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not found, and critical schema markup is missing, making them invisible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to make Prosperity Heating & Cooling a top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Reach: Optimize Prosperity Heating & Cooling for 2026
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI visibility and attract more HVAC leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
